name: Palamina Corp.
description: Palamina Corp. is an exploration-stage company focused on the discovery and development of economic mineral deposits, primarily gold, silver, and copper. Headquartered in Toronto, Canada, the company concentrates its exploration activities in Peru, where it manages a portfolio of projects including the Usicayos Gold Project and the Galena Silver Copper Manganese Project. Palamina is dedicated to creating shareholder value through drill discovery and is currently advancing its projects toward development, with plans to resume drilling operations to further explore its significant mineral assets in the region.
